message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 149 — STORAGE 140/140 milestone

RusticMaple: search/semantic cluster — 10 new storage cx-first
siblings (search / search_with_options / search_with_results /
store_embedding / get_unembedded_segments / get_embedding /
embedding_stats / store_embedding_f32 / semantic_search /
hybrid_search_with_results).

Storage cx-first coverage: 140/140 pub async fns (100%). No legacy
method lacks a sibling. Direct-sweep phase of ft-xbnl0.2.3 complete
for StorageHandle; future ticks focus on call-site migration or
downstream subsystems.
